Summaryinfo.ReportComments: NB: Boyum IT A/S does not perform any support on modification of this layout.

Table.Name: Command
Table.Command: --{?ObjectId@} /* SELECTION - BEGIN (ADD FIELDS AS NEEDED) T0 = Header T1 = Business Partner T2 = DocumentSeries T3 = Project T4 = ShippingType T5 = SalesEmployee (Header) T6 = Employee (Owner) T7 = Contact Person T8 = Dunning Term T9 = Payment Term */ SELECT T0."DocEntry", T0."DocNum", T0."DocType", T0."DocDate", T0."DocDueDate", T0."CardCode", T0."CardName", T0."Address", T0."NumAtCard", T0."VatSum", T0."VatSumFC", T0."DiscPrcnt", T0."DiscSum", T0."DiscSumFC", T0."DocCur", T0."DocTotal", T0."DocTotalFC", T0."Comments", T0."SlpCode", T0."TrnspCode", T0."CntctCode", T0."FatherCard", T0."FatherType", T0."TotalExpns", T0."TotalExpFC", T0."Address2", T0."ShipToCode", T0."LicTradNum", T0."PaymentRef", T0."Project", T0."DpmPrcnt", T0."PaidSum", T0."PaidSumFc", T0."Header", T0."Footer", T0."LangCode", T0."PayToCode", T1."CardType", T2."SeriesName", T3."PrjName", T4."TrnspName", T5."SlpName", T6."firstName" AS "Owner_FirstName", T6."middleName" AS "Owner_MiddleName", T6."lastName" AS "Owner_LastName", T6."sex" AS "Owner_Sex", T6."jobTitle" AS "Owner_JobTitle", T7."Name" AS "ContactPerson_Name", T7."Position" AS "ContactPerson_Position", T7."Tel1" AS "ContactPerson_Tel1", T7."Tel2" AS "ContactPerson_Tel2", T7."Cellolar" AS "ContactPerson_Cellolar", T7."Fax" AS "ContactPerson_Fax", T7."E_MailL" AS "ContactPerson_EmailL", T7."Gender" AS "ContactPerson_Gender", T7."Profession" AS "ContactPerson_Profession", T7."Title" AS "ContactPerson_Title", T8."TermName", T8."YearlyRate", T9."PymntGroup", IFNULL((SELECT TS1."Trans" FROM OMLT TS0 LEFT OUTER JOIN MLT1 TS1 ON TS0."TranEntry" = TS1."TranEntry" WHERE TS0."FieldAlias" = 'PymntGroup' AND TS0."TableName" = 'OCTG' AND TS0.PK = T0."GroupNum" AND TS1."LangCode" = T0."LangCode"), T9."PymntGroup") AS "PymntGroupTranslated" FROM "{?$[BOY_TABLE]}" T0 LEFT OUTER JOIN OCRD T1 ON T0."CardCode" = T1."CardCode" LEFT OUTER JOIN NNM1 T2 ON T0."ObjType" = T2."ObjectCode" AND T0."Series" = T2."Series" LEFT OUTER JOIN OPRJ T3 ON T0."Project" = T3."PrjCode" LEFT OUTER JOIN OSHP T4 ON T0."TrnspCode" = T4."TrnspCode" LEFT OUTER JOIN OSLP T5 ON T0."SlpCode" = T5."SlpCode" LEFT OUTER JOIN OHEM T6 ON T0."OwnerCode" = T6."empID" LEFT OUTER JOIN OCPR T7 ON T0."CntctCode" = T7."CntctCode" LEFT OUTER JOIN ODUT T8 ON T1."DunTerm" = T8."TermCode" LEFT OUTER JOIN OCTG T9 ON T0."GroupNum" = T9."GroupNum" WHERE T0."DocEntry" = {?DocKey@} /* SELECTION - END */

Table.Name: Command
Table.Command:
--{?ObjectId@} /* SELECTION - BEGIN (ADD FIELDS AS NEEDED) T0 = Lines T1 = Header/SpecialLines (Do not use in selection) T2 = Item Master Data T3 = Warehouse
NB: You need to add/remove data from before and after UNION */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT NULL AS "SpecialLineType", NULL AS "SpecialLineText", NULL AS "Crap1", NULL AS "Crap2", NULL AS "SpecialLineTotal", NULL AS "SpecialLineTotalForign", T0."LineType" AS "ItemLineType", T0."BaseRef", T0."BaseType", T0."LineStatus", T0."ItemCode", T0."Dscription", T0."Quantity", T0."ShipDate", T0."OpenQty", T0."Price", T0."Currency", T0."DiscPrcnt", T0."LineTotal", T0."TotalFrgn", T0."SerialNum", T0."WhsCode", T0."TreeType", T0."AcctCode", T0."PriceBefDi", T0."SubCatNum", T0."OcrCode", T0."Project", T0."CodeBars", T0."VatPrcnt", T0."VatGroup", T0."PriceAfVAT", T0."Height1", T0."Width1", T0."Length1", T0."Volume", T0."Weight1", T0."VatSum", T0."VatSumFrgn", T0."VisOrder", T0."TaxCode", T0."TaxType", T0."FreeTxt", T0."LineType", T0."unitMsr", T0."GTotal", T0."GTotalFC", T2."SuppCatNum", T2."PicturName", T3."WhsName", IFNULL((SELECT TS1."Trans" FROM OMLT TS0 LEFT OUTER JOIN MLT1 TS1 ON TS0."TranEntry" = TS1."TranEntry" WHERE TS0."FieldAlias" = 'ItemName' AND TS0."TableName" = 'OITM' AND TS0.PK = T0."ItemCode" AND TS1."LangCode" = T1."LangCode"), T0."Dscription") AS "DscriptionTranslated", IFNULL((SELECT TS1."ItemName" FROM OITM TS1 WHERE TS1."ItemCode" = T0."ItemCode"), '') AS "DscriptionOriginal", T0."DocEntry" AS "DocEntryEx", T0."VisOrder" AS "PrimarySortCode", -1 AS "SecondarySortCode", (SELECT TS0."CardCode" FROM ODLN TS0 WHERE TS0."DocEntry" = T0."BaseEntry" AND T0."BaseType" = '15') AS "PreviousCardCode", (SELECT TS0."CardName" FROM ODLN TS0 WHERE TS0."DocEntry" = T0."BaseEntry" AND T0."BaseType" = '15') AS "PreviousCardName", (SELECT TS0."PayToCode" FROM ODLN TS0 WHERE TS0."DocEntry" = T0."BaseEntry" AND T0."BaseType" = '15') AS "PreviousPayToCode", (SELECT TS0."Address" FROM ODLN TS0 WHERE TS0."DocEntry" = T0."BaseEntry" AND T0."BaseType" = '15') AS "PreviousPayToAddress", (SELECT TS1."Name" FROM ODLN TS0 INNER JOIN OCPR TS1 ON TS0."CntctCode" = TS1."CntctCode" AND TS0."CardCode" = TS1."CardCode" WHERE TS0."DocEntry" = T0."BaseEntry" AND T0."BaseType" = '15') AS "PreviousContactPerson" FROM "{?$[BOY_TABLE_IDENTIFIER]}1" T0 INNER JOIN "{?$[BOY_TABLE]}" T1 ON T0."DocEntry" = T1."DocEntry" LEFT OUTER JOIN OITM T2 ON T0."ItemCode" = T2."ItemCode" LEFT OUTER JOIN OWHS T3 ON T0."WhsCode" = T3."WhsCode"
UNION ALL
SELECT T1."LineType", T1."LineText", (SELECT SUM(TS0."LineTotal") FROM "{?$[BOY_TABLE_IDENTIFIER]}1" TS0 WHERE TS0."DocEntry" = {?DocKey@} AND TS0."VisOrder" <= T1."AftLineNum" AND T1."LineType" = 'S' AND TS0."VisOrder" > IFNULL((SELECT MAX(TS1."AftLineNum") FROM "{?$[BOY_TABLE_IDENTIFIER]}10" TS1 WHERE TS1."LineType" = 'S' AND TS1."DocEntry" = {?DocKey@} AND TS1."AftLineNum" < T1."AftLineNum"), -1)), (SELECT SUM(TS0."TotalFrgn") FROM "{?$[BOY_TABLE_IDENTIFIER]}1" TS0 WHERE TS0."DocEntry" = {?DocKey@} AND TS0."VisOrder" <= T1."AftLineNum" AND T1."LineType" = 'S' AND TS0."VisOrder" > IFNULL((SELECT MAX(TS1."AftLineNum") FROM "{?$[BOY_TABLE_IDENTIFIER]}10" TS1 WHERE TS1."LineType" = 'S' AND TS1."DocEntry" = {?DocKey@} AND TS1."AftLineNum" < T1."AftLineNum"), -1)), (SELECT SUM(TS0."LineTotal") FROM "{?$[BOY_TABLE_IDENTIFIER]}1" TS0 WHERE TS0."DocEntry" = {?DocKey@} AND TS0."VisOrder" <= T1."AftLineNum" AND T1."LineType" = 'S' AND TS0."VisOrder" > IFNULL((SELECT MAX(TS1."AftLineNum") FROM "{?$[BOY_TABLE_IDENTIFIER]}10" TS1 WHERE TS1."LineType" = 'S' AND TS1."DocEntry" = {?DocKey@} AND TS1."AftLineNum" < T1."AftLineNum"), -1)), (SELECT SUM(TS0."TotalFrgn") FROM "{?$[BOY_TABLE_IDENTIFIER]}1" TS0 WHERE TS0."DocEntry" = {?DocKey@} AND TS0."VisOrder" <= T1."AftLineNum" AND T1."LineType" = 'S' AND TS0."VisOrder" > IFNULL((SELECT MAX(TS1."AftLineNum") FROM "{?$[BOY_TABLE_IDENTIFIER]}10" TS1 WHERE TS1."LineType" = 'S' AND TS1."DocEntry" = {?DocKey@} AND TS1."AftLineNum" < T1."AftLineNum"), -1)), T0."LineType" AS "ItemLineType", T0."BaseRef", T0."BaseType", T0."LineStatus", T0."ItemCode", T0."Dscription", T0."Quantity", T0."ShipDate", T0."OpenQty", T0."Price", T0."Currency", T0."DiscPrcnt", T0."LineTotal", T0."TotalFrgn", T0."SerialNum", T0."WhsCode", T0."TreeType", T0."AcctCode", T0."PriceBefDi", T0."SubCatNum", T0."OcrCode", T0."Project", T0."CodeBars", T0."VatPrcnt", T0."VatGroup", T0."PriceAfVAT", T0."Height1", T0."Width1", T0."Length1", T0."Volume", T0."Weight1", T0."VatSum", T0."VatSumFrgn", T0."VisOrder", T0."TaxCode", T0."TaxType", T0."FreeTxt", T0."LineType", T0."unitMsr", T0."GTotal", T0."GTotalFC", T2."SuppCatNum", T2."PicturName", T3."WhsName", '', '', T1."DocEntry", T1."AftLineNum", T1."LineSeq", '', '', '', '', '' FROM "{?$[BOY_TABLE_IDENTIFIER]}1" T0 RIGHT OUTER JOIN "{?$[BOY_TABLE_IDENTIFIER]}10" T1 ON 1 = 2 LEFT OUTER JOIN OITM T2 ON T0."ItemCode" = T2."ItemCode" LEFT OUTER JOIN OWHS T3 ON T0."WhsCode" = T3."WhsCode") AS Lines WHERE "DocEntryEx" = {?DocKey@} ORDER BY "PrimarySortCode", "SecondarySortCode" /* SELECTION - END */

Table.Name: Command
Table.Command: SELECT IFNULL(T0."CompnyName", '') AS "Name", IFNULL(T0."CompnyAddr", '') AS "AddressFull", IFNULL(T1."Street", '') AS "AddressStreet", IFNULL(T1."Block", '') AS "AddressBlock", IFNULL(T1."City", '') AS "AddressCity", IFNULL(T1."ZipCode", '') AS "AddressZipCode", IFNULL(T1."County", '') AS "AddressCounty", IFNULL(T1."State", '') AS "AddressState", IFNULL(T0."Country", '') AS "AddressCountry", IFNULL(T0."Phone1", '') AS "Phone1", IFNULL(T0."Phone2", '') AS "Phone2", IFNULL(T0."Fax", '') AS "Fax", IFNULL(T0."E_Mail", '') AS "Email", IFNULL(T0."Manager", '') AS "Manager", IFNULL(T0."MainCurncy", '') AS "LocalCurrency", IFNULL(T0."SysCurrncy", '') AS "SystemCurrency", IFNULL(T0."TaxIdNum", '') AS "FederalTaxId", IFNULL(T0."TaxIdNum2", '') AS "FederalTaxId2", IFNULL(T0."TaxIdNum3", '') AS "FederalTaxId3", IFNULL(T0."FreeZoneNo", '') AS "AdditionalId", IFNULL(T0."RevOffice", '') AS "TaxOffice", IFNULL(T0."CaredType", '') AS "PayInFormType", IFNULL(T0."PBSNumber", '') AS "PayInFormNumber", IFNULL(T0."PBSGroupNo", '') AS "PayInFormGroupNumber", IFNULL(T1."IntrntAdrs", '') AS "Website", IFNULL(T0."PrintHeadr", '') AS "PrintHeader", IFNULL(T0."XmlPath", '') AS "PathXml", IFNULL(T0."ExcelPath", '') AS "PathExcel", IFNULL(T2."WordPath", '') AS "PathWord", IFNULL(T2."BitmapPath", '') AS "PathBitmap", IFNULL(T2."AttachPath", '') AS "PathAttach", IFNULL(T2."ExtPath", '') AS "PathExtension", IFNULL(T0."BankCountr", '') AS "BankCountry", IFNULL(T0."DflBnkCode", '') AS "BankCode", (SELECT IFNULL(TS0."BankName", '') FROM ODSC TS0 WHERE TS0."CountryCod" = T0."BankCountr" AND TS0."BankCode" = T0."DflBnkCode") AS "BankName", (SELECT IFNULL(TS0."SwiftNum", '') FROM ODSC TS0 WHERE TS0."CountryCod" = T0."BankCountr" AND TS0."BankCode" = T0."DflBnkCode") AS "BankSwift", (SELECT IFNULL(TS0.IBAN, '') FROM DSC1 TS0 WHERE TS0."Country" = T0."BankCountr" AND TS0."BankCode" = T0."DflBnkCode" AND TS0."Branch" = T0."DflBranch" AND TS0."Account" = T0."DflBnkAcct") AS "BankIban", (SELECT IFNULL(TS0."Street", '') FROM DSC1 TS0 WHERE TS0."Country" = T0."BankCountr" AND TS0."BankCode" = T0."DflBnkCode" AND TS0."Branch" = T0."DflBranch" AND TS0."Account" = T0."DflBnkAcct") AS "BankStreet", (SELECT IFNULL(TS0."Block", '') FROM DSC1 TS0 WHERE TS0."Country" = T0."BankCountr" AND TS0."BankCode" = T0."DflBnkCode" AND TS0."Branch" = T0."DflBranch" AND TS0."Account" = T0."DflBnkAcct") AS "BankBlock", (SELECT IFNULL(TS0."City", '') FROM DSC1 TS0 WHERE TS0."Country" = T0."BankCountr" AND TS0."BankCode" = T0."DflBnkCode" AND TS0."Branch" = T0."DflBranch" AND TS0."Account" = T0."DflBnkAcct") AS "BankCity", (SELECT IFNULL(TS0."County", '') FROM DSC1 TS0 WHERE TS0."Country" = T0."BankCountr" AND TS0."BankCode" = T0."DflBnkCode" AND TS0."Branch" = T0."DflBranch" AND TS0."Account" = T0."DflBnkAcct") AS "BankCounty", (SELECT IFNULL(TS0."State", '') FROM DSC1 TS0 WHERE TS0."Country" = T0."BankCountr" AND TS0."BankCode" = T0."DflBnkCode" AND TS0."Branch" = T0."DflBranch" AND TS0."Account" = T0."DflBnkAcct") AS "BankState", (SELECT IFNULL(TS0."ZipCode", '') FROM DSC1 TS0 WHERE TS0."Country" = T0."BankCountr" AND TS0."BankCode" = T0."DflBnkCode" AND TS0."Branch" = T0."DflBranch" AND TS0."Account" = T0."DflBnkAcct") AS "BankZipCode", IFNULL(T0."DflBnkAcct", '') AS "BankAccount", IFNULL(T0."DflBranch", '') AS "BankBranch", IFNULL(T0."HldCode", '') AS "HolidayCode", IFNULL(T0."MultiLang", '') AS "MultiLanguageSupport", IFNULL(T2."LogoFile", '') AS "Logo" FROM OADM T0 INNER JOIN ADM1 T1 ON 1 = 1 INNER JOIN OADP T2 ON 1 = 1

FormulaFieldDefinitions.FormulaFieldDefinition:
switch( {?ObjectId@} = 23, switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Tilbud', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Tilbud', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Angebot ', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Oferta', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Tarjous', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Offerte', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Citation', True, 'Quotation' //Default English ),
{?ObjectId@} = 17, switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Ordre', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Ordre', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Auftrag ', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Pedido', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Tilaus', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Order', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Commander', True, 'Order' //Default English ),
{?ObjectId@} = 15, switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Levering', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Levering', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Lieferung', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Entrega', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Lähete', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Vrachtbrief', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Bon de livraison', True, 'Delivery note' //Default English ),
{?ObjectId@} = 16, switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Returnering', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Retur', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Retoure', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Devolución', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Palautus', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Retour', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Retour', True, 'Return' //Default English ),
{?ObjectId@} = 203, switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Forudbetaling', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Forskuddsbetaling', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Vorauszahlung', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Pago anticipado', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Ennakkolasku', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Aanbetaling', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Acompte', True, 'Down Payment' //Default English ),
{?ObjectId@} = 13, switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Faktura', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Faktura', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Rechnung', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Factura', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Lasku', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Factuur', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Facture', True, 'Invoice' //Default English ), {?ObjectId@} = 14, switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Kreditnota', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Kreditnota', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Gutschrift', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Nota de abono', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Hyvityslasku', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Credit nota', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Note de crédit', True, 'Credit note' //Default English ),
{?ObjectId@} = 22, switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Indkøbsordre', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Innkjøpsordre', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Einkaufsauftrag', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Pedido', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Ostotilaus', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Inkooporder', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Bon de commande', True, 'Purchase order' //Default English ),
{?ObjectId@} = 20, switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Varetilgang', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Varemottak', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Warenzugang', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Entrada Mercancías', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Tavaranvastaanotto', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Goederenontvangst', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Réception marchandises', True, 'Goods Receipt PO' //Default English ),
{?ObjectId@} = 21, switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Returnering', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Retur', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Retoure', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Devolución', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Palautus', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Retouren', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Marchandises de retour', True, 'Goods Return' //Default English ),
{?ObjectId@} = 204, switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Forudbetaling', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Nedbetaling', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Vorauszahlung', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Pago anticipado', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Ennakkolasku', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Aanbetaling', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Acompte', True, 'Down Payment' //Default English ), {?ObjectId@} = 18, switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Faktura', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Faktura', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Rechnung', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Factura', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Lasku', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Factuur', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Facture', True, 'Invoice' //Default English ),
{?ObjectId@} = 19, switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Kreditnota', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Kreditnota', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Gutschrift', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Nota de abono', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Hyvityslasku', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Credit nota', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Note de crédit', True, 'Credit Note' //Default English ),
{?ObjectId@} = 540000006, switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Tilbud', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Tilbud', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Angebot ', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Oferta', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Tarjous', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Offerte', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Citation', True, 'Quotation' //Default English ),
{?ObjectId@} = 1470000113, switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Indkøbsrekvisition', True, 'Purchase Request' //Default English ), {?ObjectId@} = 234000031, switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Returneringsanmodning', True, 'Return Request' //Default English ), {?ObjectId@} = 234000032, switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Varereturneringsanmodning', True, 'Good Return Request' //Default English ),
TRUE, 'NOT SUPPORTED DOCUMENT TYPE' )

switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Betalingsdetaljer:', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Betalingsdetaljer:', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Zahlungsdetails', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Detalles de pago', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Maksutiedot', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Betalingsgegevens', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Détails des paiements', True, 'Payment Details:' //Default English )

switch( {Header.CardType} = 'C', switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Kundenr.', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Kundenr.', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Kundennr.', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Número de cliente', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Asiakasnumero', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Klantnr.', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Numéro de client', True, 'Customer No.' //Default English ),
{Header.CardType} = 'S', switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Leverandørnr.', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Leverandørnr.', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Lieferantennr.', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Número de proveedor', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Toimittajanumero', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Leveranciersnr.', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Numéro du fournisseur', True, 'Supplier No.' //Default English ),
{Header.CardType} = 'L', switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Kundeemnenr.', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Prospect nr.', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Potentielle Kundennr.', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Núm. de cliente potencial', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Potentiaalisen kumppanin numero', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Prospect nr.', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Numéro de client potentiels', True, 'Lead No.' //Default English ) )

switch( {Header.CardType} = 'C', switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Kundenavn', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Kundenavn', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Kundenname', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Nombre de cliente', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Asiakkaan nimi', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Klantnaam', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Nom du client', True, 'Customer name' //Default English ),
{Header.CardType} = 'S', switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Leverandørnavn', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Leverandørnavn', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Lieferantenname', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Nombre de proveedor', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Toimittajan nimi', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Leveranciersnaam', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Nom du fournisseur', True, 'Supplier name' //Default English ),
{Header.CardType} = 'L', switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Kundeemne navn', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Prospect navn', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Potentieller Kundenname', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Nombre del cliente potencial', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Potentiaalisen kumppanin nimi', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Prospectnaam', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Nom du client potentiel', True, 'Lead name' //Default English ) )

switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Faktura-adresse', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Fakturaadresse', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Rechnungsadresse', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Dirección de factura', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Laskutusosoite', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Factuuradres', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Adresse de facturation', True, 'Bill-to address' //Default English )

switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Leveringsadresse', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Leveringsadresse', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Lieferadresse', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Dirección de entrega', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Toimitusosoite', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Leveringsadres', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Adresse de livraison', True, 'Ship-to address' //Default English )

switch( {Header.CardType} = 'C', switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Ref.nr.', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Referanse', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Referenz-Nr.', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Núm. de referencia', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Asiakasviitenro', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Klant Refnr.', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'De référence', True, 'Customer ref.' //Default English ),
{Header.CardType} = 'S', switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Ref.nr.', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Leverandørref. nr.', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Referenz-Nr.', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Núm. de referencia', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Toimittajan viitenro', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Leverancier Refnr.', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'De référence', True, 'Supplier ref.' //Default English ),
{Header.CardType} = 'L', switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Ref.nr.', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Referanse', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Referenz-Nr.', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Núm. de referencia', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Asiakasviitenro', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Klant Refnr.', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'De référence', True, 'Customer ref.' //Default English ) )

switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Bogføringsdato', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Bokføringsdato', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Buchungsdatum', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Fecha contable', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Tositepvm', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Factuurdatum', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Date du document', True, 'Doc. date' //Default English )

switch( {@X_Is_AR_Quotation}, switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Gyldig til', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Gyldig til', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Gültig bis', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Válido hasta', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Voimassaolon loppu', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Geldig tot', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Valable pour', True, 'Valid untill' ), {@X_Is_AP_Quotation}, switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Gyldig til', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Gyldig til', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Gültig bis', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Válido hasta', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Voimassaolon loppu', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Geldig tot', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Valable pour', True, 'Valid untill' ), {@X_Is_AR_Order} OR {@X_Is_AR_Delivery} OR {@X_Is_AP_Order}, switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Leveringsdato', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Leveringsdato', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Lieferdatum', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Fecha de entrega', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Toimituspäivämäärä', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Leveringsdatum', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Date de livraison', True, 'Delivery date' ), {@X_Is_AP_Request}, switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Nødvendig Dato', True, 'Required date' ), {@X_Is_AP_GoodsReturnRequest} OR {@X_Is_AR_ReturnRequest}, switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Returdato', True, 'Return Date' ), True, switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Forfaldsdato', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Forfallsdato', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Fälligkeitsdatum', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Fecha de vencimiento', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Eräpäivä', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Uiterste betaaldatum', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Date d`échéance', True, 'Due date' ) )

switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'EU-Moms nummer', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Org.nr', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'EU Ust-ID', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'EU NIF', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'ALV-numero', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'BTW-nr', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Numéro de TVA', True, 'Federal Tax Id' //Default English )

switch( {?ObjectId@} = 23, switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Tilbudsnr.', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Tilbudsnr.', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Angebotsnr.', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Número de oferta', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Tarjousnumero', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Offertenr.', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Numéro cotation', True, 'Quotation No.' //Default English ),
{?ObjectId@} = 17, switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Ordrenr.', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Ordrenr.', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Auftragsnr.', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Número de pedido', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Tilausnumero', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Ordernr.', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Numéro de commande', True, 'Order No.' //Default English ),

{?ObjectId@} = 16, switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Returnering', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Retur nr.', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Retoure', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Devolución', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Palautusnumero', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Retournr.', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Numéro de retour', True, 'Return No.' //Default English ),
{?ObjectId@} = 203, switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Forudbetalingsnr.', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Forskuddsbetalingsnr.', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Vorauszahlungs-Nr.', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Núm. de pago anticipo', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Ennakkolaskunumero', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Aanbetalingsnr.', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Acompte', True, 'Down Payment No.' //Default English ),

{?ObjectId@} = 21, switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Returnering', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Retur', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Retoure', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Devolución', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Palautusnumero', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Retournering.', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Retour', True, 'Goods Return no.' //Default English ),

switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Betalingsbetingelse', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Betalingsvilkår', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Zahlungsbedingungen', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Condiciones de pago', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Maksuehdot', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Betalingscondities', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Conditions de paiement', True, 'Payment terms' //Default English )

switch( {?ObjectId@} = 23 OR {?ObjectId@} = 17 OR {?ObjectId@} = 15 OR {?ObjectId@} = 16 OR {?ObjectId@} = 203 OR {?ObjectId@} = 13 OR {?ObjectId@} = 14 OR {?ObjectId@} = 234000031, switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Salgsmedarbejder', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Selger', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Verkaufsmitarbeiter', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Vendedor', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Myyjä', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Verkoper', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Vendeur', True, 'Salesemployee' //Default English ),

switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Forsendelsesart', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Transporttype', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Versandart', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Clase expedición', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Toimitustapa', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Verzendwijze', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Type d`expédition', True, 'Shipping type' //Default English )

switch( {Header.DocType} = 'I', switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Artikelnavn', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Varenavn', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Artikelbeschreibung', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Descripción de artículo', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Tuotteen nimi', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Artikelomschrijving', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Description de l`article', True, 'Item name' //Default English ), {Header.DocType} = 'S', switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Beskrivelse', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Beskrivelse', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Beschreibung', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Descripción', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Kuvaus', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Omschrijving', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Description', True, 'Description' //Default English ) )

switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Total', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Total', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Linie Gesamt', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Total de línea', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Yhteensä', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Totaal', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Total des', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Eenheid', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Unité', True, 'Total' //Default English )

switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Pris før rabat', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Pris før rabatt', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Preis vor Rabatt', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Precio antes del descuento', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Hinta ennen alennusta', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Prijs zonder korting', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Prix ​​avant réduction', True, 'Price before discount' //Default English )

switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Pris efter moms', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Pris etter moms', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Preis nach MwSt.', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Precio (IVA inc.)', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Verollinen hinta', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Prijs exclusief BTW', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Prix ​​hors TVA', True, 'Price after VAT' //Default English )

switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Samlet i alt '+{@Currency}, {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Totalt '+{@Currency}, {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Gesamtsumme '+{@Currency}, {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Suma total '+{@Currency}, {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Tosite yhteensä '+{@Currency}, {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Totaal '+{@Currency}, {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Somme totale '+{@Currency}, True, 'Document total '+{@Currency} //Default English )

switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Konsolideringsadresse', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Konsolideringsadresse', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Konsolidierungsadresse', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Dirección de consolidación', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Konsolidointiosoite', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Consolidatieadres', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Adresse de consolidation', True, 'Delivery Consolidation address' //Default English )

switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Samlet', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Total før rabatt', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Summe', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Total ', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Yhteensä ', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Totaal excl. BTW ', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Total des ', True, 'Total' //Default English )

switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Efter forfaldsdato beregnes renter med '+ToText({Header.YearlyRate})+' % pr påbegyndt måned.', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Etter forfallsdato beregnes renter med '+ToText({Header.YearlyRate})+' % per påbegynte måned.', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Nach Fälligkeitsdatum werden Verzugszinsen von '+ToText({Header.YearlyRate})+' % pro angefangener Monat berechnet', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'En caso de demora en el pago cargamos un '+ToText({Header.YearlyRate})+' % de interés por mes iniciado', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Viivästyskorko '+ToText({Header.YearlyRate})+' % ', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'In geval van betaling na vervaldatum zal '+ToText({Header.YearlyRate})+' % rente in rekening gebracht worden voor elke begonnen maand vanaf de vervaldatum', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'En cas de retard de paiement d`un intérêt '+ToText({Header.YearlyRate})+' % seront facturés pour chaque mois entamé à partir de la date d`échéance', True, 'In case of delayed payment a '+ToText({Header.YearlyRate})+' % interest will be charged for each commenced month from maturity date' //Default English )

switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Bankadresse', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Bankadresse', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Bankanschrift', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Dirección de banco', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Pankin osoite', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Bankadres', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Adresse de la banque', True, 'Bank-address' //Default English )

switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Kontonr.', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Kontonr.', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Kontonummer', {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Número de cuenta', {@X_Language} = 'Fi', 'Tilinumero', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Rekeningnummer', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Numéro de compte', True, 'Account' //Default English )

switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Forudbetalings %', {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Forskuddsbetaling %', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Vorauszahlungs %', {@X_Language} = 'ES', '% de pago anticipado', {@X_Language} = 'FI', 'Ennakkomaksu %', {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Voorschot', {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Acompte %', True, 'Down payment %' //Default English )
